check.ask:
Present {{user_question.statement}}. Options: {{user_question.options}} (recommended first).
Capture answer + rejected alternatives + agent's why-not rationale for each rejected option. Store as {{turn_user_answer}}.

invoke-agent.name: researcher

substep.title: Perform Artifact Checks (if any)
substep.action: For each artifact_check item: read the file directly (bundle files, CONTEXT.md, briefs in thoughts/). Append the findings to {{turn_synthesis}}.

substep.title: Spot Term Resolutions + DR Triggers
substep.action:
Scan {{turn_synthesis}} and {{turn_user_answer}} for:
- **Resolved terms**: domain terms now precise that were fuzzy before. Mark {{glossary_updates}} = list of {term, definition, aliases_to_avoid}.
- **DR candidates**: hard-to-reverse decisions surfaced this turn. Apply the three-condition gate per decision-record-format skill. If all three fire, mark {{dr_candidate}} = {title, context, decision, why, considered_options}.
These flags drive step 5.
